response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack experience, including current hands-on work with TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent/MCP tooling that directly matches the role's unusual AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and MongoDB/MySQL cover most required skills. Gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin, and frontend history weighted toward Ember.js rather than React, though React exposure exists at Optilyz.
strengths: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience, a rare and directly required skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack background across product and platform work, with strong TDD and testing expertise
Cloud and container proficiency (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) plus MongoDB/MySQL database experience
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, the primary backend framework for the role
Frontend depth is weighted toward Ember.js; React experience appears comparatively limited
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears dated, limiting coverage of the secondary stack

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js fullstack depth with strong testing practices
Missing Nest.js and limited React/Kotlin depth
